name: chaingpt-creator-sidekick
description: Open-source AI features for video creator platforms, powered by ChainGPT API. Built by Elyan Labs as a reference integration. BoTTube uses this as its first implementation.

scripts.test: node test/test_sanitize.js && node --env-file=.env test/test_tipping_coach.js && node --env-file=.env test/test_script_to_thumbnail.js && node --env-file=.env test/test_news_brief.js && node --env-file=.env test/test_thumbnail_image.js

author: Elyan Labs
